title: Watch Arbitrage Tracker — Input
description: Track Rolex, Patek Philippe & Audemars Piguet price spreads across 6 marketplaces. Get a Telegram ping when a listing breaks below your spread threshold.

references.title: Watch references
references.description:
Precise reference numbers give the cleanest arbitrage signals. Examples: 5711/1A-010, 116500LN, 124060, 15500ST.OO.1220ST.04.

Brand is auto-detected — mix Patek / Rolex / AP freely. Model names like Nautilus or Daytona work too but conflate sub-models with different prices.

Tip: start with 3-5 refs you actually trade, add more later.
references.sectionDescription: Pick the watches you want to monitor. 3-5 references is a good first run.

spread_sensitivity.title: Spread threshold (%)
spread_sensitivity.description:
Fire an alert when a listing sits below the cross-platform median by at least this %. Decimals work — 4.5 fires at 4.5%.

Guide: 3% = chatty (volume flippers) · 5% = recommended · 8% = selective · 15%+ = once-a-month opportunities.
spread_sensitivity.sectionDescription: How aggressive should the alerts be and where do they land.

alert_channel.title: Where to receive alerts
alert_channel.description: Telegram is fastest for time-sensitive flips. Pick Dataset only if you'd rather poll Apify Console yourself.

compare_mode.title: Spread framing
compare_mode.description:
How the actor frames the arbitrage opportunity in alerts.

Global — one cross-platform median, alert below by your threshold. Country pair — surface country-vs-country gaps ("JP $148k ↔ US $192k"); best for dealers who already source globally. Per country — median computed per country (rare).

alert_telegram_bot_token.title: Telegram bot token
alert_telegram_bot_token.description: One-time setup, 2 min: open @BotFather on Telegram → /newbot → name it → paste the token here. Full guide: https://core.telegram.org/bots#how-do-i-create-a-bot

alert_telegram_chat_id.title: Telegram chat ID
alert_telegram_chat_id.description: Open Telegram → search @userinfobot → tap Start → paste the numeric ID here.

filter_conditions.title: Conditions to include
filter_conditions.description:
A new 5711 vs a pre-owned 5711 can spread by $30K+. Filtering tightens the signal.

Bobs, Watchfinder UK and European Watch scrape condition reliably. Chrono24, WatchBox and Watches of Switzerland often report unknown — keep it checked if you want full volume.
filter_conditions.sectionDescription: Tighten which listings count toward the spread. Skip if you want maximum volume.

filter_box_papers.title: Box & papers status to include
filter_box_papers.description: A full-set 5711 commands a 20-30% premium vs watch-only. Watchfinder, Bobs and European Watch report this reliably; others may report unknown.

strict_condition_matching.title: Strict condition matching
strict_condition_matching.description: When on, drop listings where the marketplace didn't report a condition. Pairs well with restricting marketplaces to Bobs + Watchfinder + European Watch.

platforms.title: Marketplaces to monitor
platforms.description: Uncheck a marketplace to skip it. The Watch Club (UK/HK office) shipped with verified DOM v1. Yahoo Auctions Japan requires apifyProxyCountry: 'JP' at runtime — Yahoo geo-blocks EEA/UK traffic.

enumTitles: 🇬🇧 The Watch Club — London / HK office

platforms.sectionDescription: 6 production sources by default. The Watch Club + Yahoo JP available as opt-in extras.

price_ceilings.title: Per-reference price ceilings (USD)
price_ceilings.description:
Override the median anchor with your own target intake price per reference. Format: reference:max_price_usd with no spaces around the colon.

Examples: 5711/1A-010:185000, 116500LN:28000. Leave empty to use the cross-platform median for every ref. Invalid rows are silently skipped.

max_listings_per_ref_per_platform.title: Max listings per ref per platform
max_listings_per_ref_per_platform.description: Caps fetches per reference per marketplace. Default 25 handles ~60 refs × 6 platforms ≈ 9000 listings/run. Lower for cheaper runs.

proxyConfiguration.title: Proxy configuration
proxyConfiguration.description: Apify Proxy is recommended for reliable scraping across all 6 marketplaces. Residential proxies help avoid blocks on Chrono24 and WatchBox.
